items.name: Alibaba
items.description: Alibaba Group is a hyperscaler and one of the earliest large-scale deployers of SONiC across its global data-center fabric.

items.name: Arista Networks
items.description: Arista Networks delivers cloud networking solutions and actively contributes to the SONiC ecosystem.

items.name: Broadcom
items.description: Broadcom provides the silicon (Trident, Tomahawk, Jericho families) underpinning the majority of SONiC-capable switches worldwide.

items.name: Celestica
items.description: Celestica designs and manufactures open white-box switches (DS/ES series) that run SONiC and are validated by multiple ecosystem partners.

items.name: Cisco Systems
items.description: Cisco supports SONiC on its Nexus and Silicon One platforms and has invested in the SONiC ecosystem.

items.name: Dell Technologies
items.description: Dell offers its PowerSwitch portfolio with full SONiC support and is a key hardware vendor validated across multiple SONiC distributions.

items.name: Google
items.description: Google uses SONiC extensively in its global network infrastructure and is an active contributor to the upstream open-source project.

items.name: Marvell Technology
items.description: Marvell provides ASIC silicon (Prestera, Teralynx) with full SAI/SONiC support for multi-vendor open-networking deployments.

items.name: Microsoft
items.description: Microsoft created SONiC for Azure data centers in 2016 and open-sourced it, seeding the global community that now powers the SONiC Foundation.

items.name: Nexthop AI
items.description: Nexthop AI builds AI-native networking solutions leveraging SONiC for hyperscale and enterprise AI infrastructure deployments.

items.name: Nokia
items.description: Nokia joined the SONiC Foundation as a Premier Member and integrates SONiC into its open-networking and IP/optical portfolio.

items.name: NVIDIA
items.description: NVIDIA Spectrum ASICs ship with full SONiC support and NVIDIA actively drives RoCEv2/AI fabric features for large-scale GPU clusters.

items.name: Upscale AI
items.description: Upscale AI delivers AI-optimized network infrastructure solutions built on SONiC for next-generation AI data centers.
